note: Weekly rotators the Bungie API does NOT expose (featured raid pair, featured dungeon pair, weekly Grandmaster Alert + its weapon). Community-tracked. This file is the SEED layer: hand-verified per-week entries keyed by the weekly-reset ISO (Tuesday 17:00 UTC), verified:true, source:'seed'. For a current week that is NOT seeded here, rotations.js auto-fetches raids/dungeons from a vetted source (see rotations-source.js) and caches them in-memory (verified:false, source:'kyberscorner'). No forward extrapolation — unseeded/unfetched weeks resolve to source:'unknown' and the UI hides the card. GM Alert weapon has no stable source page, so it only appears for hand-seeded weeks. To pin a week: run `node scripts/refresh-rotations.mjs --write` (fills raids/dungeons) and add the grandmasterAlert by hand.
